text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... It's kinda boring just going home. I wonder if there's something fun we could do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Actually, ever since I saw how much fun she had
at the zoo, I've been looking into other places
that she might enjoy. This might be the perfect
opportunity to try!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You seem awfully sure of yourself. Is it really that
fun?
choice_data_list: I have a careful selection of magical locations!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? If you're really that confident, let's see
what you got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, I take her to a place where a
sword-and-sorcery fantasy movie was shot.
However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I thought you said we were going somewhere
where there was a great magical battle?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woosh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Are you suuuure people used magic here? It's
pretty weird there aren't any traces of magic at
all!
choice_data_list: W-well, next is a place we can see magic!

text_block_list.name: Wandering Magician
text_block_list.text:
Abracadabra!
Goodbye, sesame!

text_block_list.name: Wandering Magician
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it! The card the young lady
chose has disappeared! Isn't that incredible?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck? You call that magic? You just
made a card disappear is all!

text_block_list.name: Wandering Magician
text_block_list.text: Huh?! H-how is that not surprising?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma can do way more amazing magic than
that! You're nothing more than a novice!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Now this place has some atmosphere! ♪ Is
this some kind of ritual?

text_block_list.name: Man Dressed as Monk
text_block_list.text:
Rin, Pyo, To, Sha, Kai, Jin, Retsu, Zai, Zen...
KYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Man Dressed as Monk
text_block_list.text:
Join us, you two. None who wish to partake in the
esteemed Miracle ☆ Training Experience... shall...
es...cape...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
H-hey... Is it just me, or are they inching toward
us? Something's really weird here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every single place was vastly different from what I
had imagined. I thought it would be okay as long
as there was some connection to magic, but I
should have looked into everything more.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Familiar. Was that it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You look like you just saw a ghost.
Aha... That must mean...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Familiar! This is toootally
unacceptable! You haven't trained enough! Get it
together!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Here, drink this!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is the perfect tea for someone like you who's
still short on training! It's super gross!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It'll make you sweat until you're about to pass
out! Come on, hurry up and drink it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho creeps closer and closer. Then,
before I can react, she grabs hold of me and
forces her mystery tea down my throat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A chill races through my whole body! An
unbearable bitterness takes hold of my mouth,
and my strength fails...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're awake! Haha! ♪ You should've seen
the look on your face!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So how do you feel? What was it like to pass out?
Was it so gross you're still speechless?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My body feels shockingly light. It's as if all the
exhaustion I've accumulated over the day has
been swept away. This tea must have come from...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That was a super special medicine that Grandma
taught me to make! It looks like it might've been
a bit too strong for you, though.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But at least you can move again! We can dive
back into work tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're really complaining about the taste?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I know some medicine that's waaay more bitter
than that! And way more effective too! Maybe I
should make that one for you next time.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Well, there's plenty more where that
came from, so you can rest easy! Now be a good
familiar, and work yourself ragged for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The smile on her face as she concerns herself with
my health makes me want to make the next time
as fun as possible.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Of course! It's my job to look after my
familiars, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can acknowledge your gratitude for having
such a kind master! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her kindness as she concerns herself with my
health makes me want to make the next time as
fun as possible.
